rulings.Case Title: PAUL FRENKIEL ET AL VS. JO ELLEN GREEN KAISER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Stipulated Motion And Motion To Sever
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Motion calendar for March 27, 2025, line 8. Defendant's Stipulated Motion to Sever is continued to April 2, 2025. No later than March 27, 2025 by 5:00 p.m. moving party, opposing party and plaintiff to file a supplemental brief or declaration (not to exceed 3 pages) addressing whether the prayer for relief, items, 1, 2, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 13 is asserted against both the moving and the opposing defendants (compare to prayer 3, 4, 10, and 11 specifically asserted as to "OWNERS" vs. "MERCURY.") Parties shall also address how the "prayer" will be severed, i.e. which parts of the prayer as currently stated will remain in this action and which parts will be asserted in a newly numbered proposed action. =(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CUZ OF GOD, LLC VS. DENNIS SILIFAIVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Dennis Silifaiva To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Motion calendar for March 27, 2025, line 4. PLAINTIFF CUZ OF GOD, LLC'S Motion To Compel Defendant Dennis Silifaiva To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery and Deem Admissions Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall serve verified responses without objection to the Form Interrogatories-General (Set One), Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer (Set One), Request for Production of Documents (Set One), and Special Interrogatories (Set One) within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Truth of all matters in the Request for Admissions (Set One) deemed admitted. =(501/HLJ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Albaisr George
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Motion calendar for March 27, 2025, line 5. PLAINTIFF 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC'S Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Albaisr George. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Discovery and Request for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall serve complete verified responses without objection to the Special Interrogatories (Set One), Form Interrogatories-General (Set One), Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer (Set One), and Request for Production of Documents and Things (Set 1) within 5 days of notice of entry of order.
